creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Dave.

Thanks for your work.

One doubt in the Makefile.

> RIEMANN_USER?=  ${PORTNAME}
> RIEMANN_GROUP?= ${PORTNAME}
> 
> .if ${RIEMANN_USER} == "${PORTNAME}"
> USERS=  ${PORTNAME}
> .endif
> .if ${RIEMANN_GROUP} == "${PORTNAME}"
> GROUPS= ${PORTNAME}
> .endif

Are there some reason for this?

Regards.
